reviews.comment:
Muy completa, tiene restaurante donde se come muy bien, baños con duchas gratis (sólo piden mantener la limpieza)  para hombres y mujeres y un hotel. Mucho espacio para pernoctar.

(Translated by Google)
Very well-equipped, it has a restaurant with excellent food, bathrooms with free showers (just ask that they be kept clean) for men and women, and a hotel. Plenty of space to stay overnight.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCX3JuUXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un páramo,  falta más personal, en playa y servicompras,  esto haría que se pueda agilizar la única estación en cientos de km.

(Translated by Google)
It's a wasteland; there's a lack of staff, both on the beach and at the convenience store. This would help speed things up at the only station for hundreds of kilometers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCM3NYbThRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada por viaje hacia el norte. Excelente todo.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way north. Everything was excellent.

reviews.comment:
Tiene los servicios indispensables. Agua caliente para el mate, servicio de comida, duchas calientes y un excelente espacio  para estacionar con casilla o MH en caso que se haga de noche y no puedas continuar, los rateros valoramos esos lugares, así que por ese motivo le doy 5 🌟

(Translated by Google)
It has the essential services. Hot water for mate, food service, hot showers, and excellent parking with a booth or MH in case it gets dark and you can't continue. We thieves value those places, so for that reason I give it a 5 🌟
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcHFXaTVnRRAB
